name: humanize
description: Humanize text by removing common AI writing tells while preserving meaning and voice.

interface.shortDescription: Rewrite AI-sounding text into natural prose.
interface.longDescription: Humanizer adds a Codex skill for rewriting AI-sounding text. It scans for common tells such as inflated significance, promotional language, vague attribution, rule-of-three padding, em dashes, generic conclusions, excessive hedging, and chatbot artifacts, then rewrites the text while preserving meaning, paragraph coverage, and the requested voice.
defaultPrompt: Humanize this text without changing its meaning.
Rewrite this in my voice and remove AI tells.
Make this sound natural and keep the same structure.
